name: mbta-on-time-lakehouse
desc: A self-managing MBTA on-time-performance lakehouse on Databricks + GCP, with an agentic layer that writes its own insights and opens pull requests.

name: customer-analytics-pipeline
desc: Daily ELT pipeline that identifies high-value customers for sales outreach — Airflow, dbt, Spark, Iceberg, Docker.

name: data-pipeline-transformation-analytics
desc: Analytics engineering with dbt: raw NYC taxi data → dimensional models → Looker Studio business intelligence.

name: data-pipeline-orchestration-airflow
desc: Orchestrating robust data pipelines with Apache Airflow across local, GCP and Kubernetes deployments.

name: data-pipeline-orchestration-kestra
desc: Workflow orchestration with Kestra — ETL to PostgreSQL and BigQuery, fully containerized with Docker Compose.

name: vitals
desc: From raw clinical signals to trusted, AI-ready data — a health-data medallion lakehouse (Databricks/Delta, dbt, Airflow).
